title: impatiens rubromaculata subsp. schulziana
intro: Impatiens rubromaculata subsp. schulziana, also known as the 'Impatiens' or 'Busy Lizzie', is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the balsam family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Impatiens rubromaculata subsp. schulziana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Impatiens rubromaculata subsp. schulziana can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to utilize its medicinal and health benefits.
